summary: Iteration 55: P1 Features Testing - All P1 features implemented and working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright.

issues: Login modal blocks interaction for non-authenticated users - EXPECTED behavior per feature requirements

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (12/12 passed) ===
✅ GET /api/ - API root accessible
✅ GET /api/referrals/status - requires auth (401/403)
✅ GET /api/referrals/status - returns correct structure (referral_code, referral_count, total_reward_eur, rewards_table)
✅ POST /api/referrals/apply - requires auth (401/403)
✅ POST /api/referrals/apply - rejects empty/short code (400)
✅ POST /api/referrals/apply - rejects self-referral (400)
✅ POST /api/referrals/apply - rejects invalid code (404)
✅ FB Pixel script present in index.html (PLACEHOLDER_FB_PIXEL_ID)
✅ ProductSearchPage has share button data-testids (WhatsApp, Viber, Facebook, Copy)
✅ AIDesignerPage has download-render-* and fullscreen-render-* data-testids
✅ ProfilePage has 4 tabs (Профил, Проекти, Реферали, Настройки)
✅ ProfilePage Referrals tab has all UI elements (referral-code, copy-referral-btn, apply-ref-input, apply-ref-btn, share-ref-whatsapp, share-ref-viber)
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS (Playwright) ===
✅ /product-search - Page loads with data-testid='product-search-page'
✅ /product-search - Text query input and search button present
✅ /product-search - Search returns results and shows share buttons
✅ /product-search - WhatsApp, Viber, Facebook, Copy share buttons visible after search
✅ /profile - Page loads with data-testid='profile-page'
✅ /profile - 4 tabs visible: Профил, Проекти, Реферали, Настройки
✅ /profile - Referrals tab shows referral code (e.g., C62297DB)
✅ /profile - Referrals tab shows Copy, WhatsApp, Viber share buttons
✅ /profile - Referrals tab shows stats (Поканени, Спечелено)
✅ /profile - Referrals tab shows rewards milestones (1/3/5/10 referrals)
✅ /profile - Referrals tab has Apply code input and button
✅ /room-scan - AI Designer page loads with package selection
✅ /room-scan - 3 packages (69€, 129€, 199€) visible
✅ /room-scan - Room card and photo grid present
✅ /room-scan - Generate button present ('ГЕНЕРИРАЙ 3D — 69 EUR')
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ ProductSearchPage.jsx (lines 64-102): ShareResults component with WhatsApp, Viber, Facebook, Copy buttons using proper data-testids
✅ AIDesignerPage.jsx (lines 497-519): Render cards with Download and Fullscreen buttons using data-testid patterns
✅ ProfilePage.jsx (lines 178-192): 4 tabs with correct data-testids (tab-info, tab-projects, tab-referrals, tab-settings)
✅ ProfilePage.jsx (lines 374-473): Referrals tab with code display, share buttons, stats, rewards milestones, apply code form
✅ server.py (lines 3569-3640): GET /api/referrals/status and POST /api/referrals/apply endpoints with proper validation
✅ index.html (lines 72-84): FB Pixel script with PLACEHOLDER_FB_PIXEL_ID - user needs to replace with actual pixel ID
seed_data_creation: Test users created for referral API testing with timestamp-based emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified all P1 features: 1) Share results in ProductSearchPage (WhatsApp/Viber/Facebook/Copy buttons with correct data-testids). 2) FB Pixel script in index.html (PLACEHOLDER_FB_PIXEL_ID needs to be replaced by user). 3) Referrals system: GET /api/referrals/status returns referral_code (first 8 chars of user ID), referral_count, total_reward_eur, rewards_table. POST /api/referrals/apply validates code (min 6 chars), rejects self-referral, creates referral record. 4) AI Designer has Download and Fullscreen buttons in results section (visible after generation). 5) Profile page has 4 tabs: Профил, Проекти, Реферали, Настройки. Referrals tab shows code, share buttons, stats, rewards milestones, apply code input.

share_results_product_search.details: WhatsApp, Viber, Facebook, Copy share buttons with correct data-testids appear after search results

fb_pixel.details: FB Pixel script present in index.html with PLACEHOLDER_FB_PIXEL_ID (user needs to replace)

referrals_api_status.details: GET /api/referrals/status returns referral_code, referral_count, total_reward_eur, rewards_table, referral_link

referrals_api_apply.details: POST /api/referrals/apply validates code length, rejects self-referral, rejects invalid codes

ai_designer_download_fullscreen.details: Download and Fullscreen buttons have correct data-testids (download-render-*, fullscreen-render-*)

profile_4_tabs.details: Profile page has 4 tabs: Профил, Проекти, Реферали, Настройки with correct data-testids

profile_referrals_tab_ui.details: Referrals tab shows code, copy button, WhatsApp/Viber share, stats, rewards milestones, apply code input
